message:
test(ftui-i18n, ftui-extras): add 30 property tests for i18n and VFX sampling

ftui-i18n (14 tests): plural rule totality, determinism, symmetry on
negatives, CJK/English/French rule correctness, interpolation identity
and idempotency, catalog format_plural count injection, for_locale
crash resistance, coverage report bounds.

ftui-extras (16 tests): coordinate mapping bounds/monotonicity/symmetry,
fill_normalized_coords invariants, CoordCache consistency and grow-only
semantics, PlasmaSampler bounds/determinism/Off-quality, MetaballField
non-negativity/determinism/Off-quality/empty-balls, FnSampler quality
passthrough.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
